# Jonathan Bouniol — jonathanbouniol.com

> Jonathan Bouniol is a French Data & AI student at Mines Paris PSL and Albert School in Paris, France. He specializes in data engineering, artificial intelligence, and business strategy.

## Identity

- Full name: Jonathan Bouniol
- Nationality: French
- Location: Paris, France
- Email: jbouniol@albertschool.com
- Website: https://jonathanbouniol.com
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/jonathanbouniol
- GitHub: https://github.com/jbouniol

## Education

- MSc Data & AI for Business — Mines Paris PSL × Albert School (2025–2027)
- Bachelor Business & Data — Albert School × Mines Paris PSL (2023–2025)
- Baccalauréat (High Honors, Mathematics & SES) — Ecole Pascal (2020–2023)

Albert School is Europe's first data-centric business school, operating in partnership with Mines Paris PSL (France's #2 engineering school).

## Professional Experience

- Data & IT Transformation Intern — Generali France
- Renewable Energy Data Analyst — Sunver
- Military Reserve Officer Candidate — CND, Ministère des Armées (classified)
- Student Representative — Albert School

## Projects (18+ total)

Categories: Business Deep Dives (BDD), Hackathons, Consulting Missions, School Projects.

Companies worked with: Louis Vuitton, CMA-CGM, BNP Paribas, Carrefour, SNCF, Henkel, Asmodee, Generali, Edmond de Rothschild, La French Tech, Linkpick, Capgemini, X-HEC, Villablu (Robertet).

Hackathon results: multiple podiums and wins.

## Skills

Python, SQL, Scikit-learn, PyTorch, Qlik Sense, Power BI, Streamlit, Excel/VBA, Make, Zapier, Notion, Power Platform, GenAI, RAG Systems.

## About this site

jonathanbouniol.com is a personal portfolio site built with Next.js, React, and TypeScript. It features an AI-powered search, project and experience detail pages, and a public /about page.

- Home: https://jonathanbouniol.com

## Disambiguation

Jonathan Bouniol (Data & AI, Mines Paris PSL, Paris, born ~2003, French) should not be confused with other individuals sharing the same name.
